statement: NIST SP 800-218 (SSDF) current published version is 1.1, finalized 3 February 2022; a Revision 1 (SSDF v1.2) exists only as an initial public draft.

evidence.quote: 02/03/22: SP 800-218 (Final). Secure Software Development Framework (SSDF) Version 1.1

falsifier: A finalized SP 800-218 Rev.1 (v1.2) on csrc.nist.gov would falsify '1.1 is current'.
